name: Frank Hallam
background: Mr. Hallam is a co-founder of the Company and has served as President and CEO since 2022. He was previously CFO from 2002 to 2022. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant and has been involved in the mining industry for over 30 years.

commpanies.name: Platinum Group Metals Ltd.
commpanies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
